title: Robertium anemonifolium
taxonomy: Robertium anemonifolium is a plant that belongs to the family Berberidaceae. It is a genus of flowering plants that are native to China. The family Berberidaceae is a group of flowering plants that are commonly known as barberry or butterbur. These plants are characterized by their distinctive leaves and showy flowers. The classification of Robertium anemonifolium is still being researched and may be subject to change as new information becomes available.
